question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/repository/TransactionRepository.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: save(Transaction entity) inherited from CrudRepository] Can an unprivileged user call save() with a Transaction where validStartNs is set to a future timestamp far beyond the current time, causing the mirror node to record a transaction with a fee that appears to be from the future, disrupting time-ordered fee queries?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/repository/TransactionRepository.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: save(Transaction entity) inherited from CrudRepository] Can an unprivileged user call save() with a Transaction where initialBalance is set to a value that contradicts the chargedTxFee (e.g., initialBalance less than chargedTxFee), creating an impossible fee state where the payer could not have afforded the recorded fee?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/repository/TransactionRepository.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: findByConsensusTimestampBetween(long startInclusive, long endInclusive, Pageable pageable)] Can an unprivileged user exploit the Pageable offset parameter in findByConsensusTimestampBetween() to page through all transaction fee records without triggering rate limits, enabling complete fee schedule extraction for use in fee manipulation planning?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/repository/TransactionRepository.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: findByConsensusTimestampBetween(long startInclusive, long endInclusive, Pageable pageable)] Can an unprivileged user supply equal startInclusive and endInclusive values to findByConsensusTimestampBetween() to retrieve a single transaction's fee record by its exact consensusTimestamp, enabling targeted fee record reconnaissance before a save() overwrite attack?
